org.apache.dubbo.remoting

  • public interface Constants

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static String ACCEPTS_KEY
      max size of channel. default value is zero that means unlimited.
      static String BIND_IP_KEY

      static int HEARTBEAT_CHECK_TICK
      Every heartbeat duration / HEARTBEAT_CHECK_TICK, check if a heartbeat should be sent.
      static String HEARTBEAT_KEY

      • HEARTBEAT_CHECK_TICK

        static final int HEARTBEAT_CHECK_TICK
        Every heartbeat duration / HEARTBEAT_CHECK_TICK, check if a heartbeat should be sent. Every heartbeat timeout duration / HEARTBEAT_CHECK_TICK, check if a connection should be closed on server side, and if reconnect on client side
        另请参阅:
        常量字段值

      • LEAST_HEARTBEAT_DURATION

        static final long LEAST_HEARTBEAT_DURATION
        the least heartbeat during is 1000 ms.
        另请参阅:
        常量字段值

        static final int TICKS_PER_WHEEL
        ticks per wheel.
